plexMoviesCache.name: 825 Forest Road
plexMoviesCache.description: After a family tragedy, Chuck Wilson hopes to start a new life in Ashland Falls with his wife Maria and little sister Elizabeth, but he quickly discovers that the town has a dark history of being haunted by a ghostly woman who drives residents to suicide.

plexMoviesCache.name: The Accountants
plexMoviesCache.description: No description available

plexMoviesCache.name: Are You There God? It's Me, Margaret.
plexMoviesCache.description: Eleven-year-old Margaret moves from the city to the suburbs and starts to contemplate everything about life, friendship and adolescence. She relies on her mother, Barbara, who offers loving support, and her grandmother, Sylvia.

plexMoviesCache.name: The Assessment
plexMoviesCache.description: Set in a world destroyed by climate change. Part of society has created a parallel world for itself. Life is controlled and optimized, and the desire to have children is also not left to chance. The lives of a successful young couple are therefore put under close scrutiny by a female assessor over the course of seven days.

plexMoviesCache.name: Ballerina
plexMoviesCache.description: An assassin trained in the traditions of the Ruska Roma organization sets out to seek revenge after her father's death.

plexMoviesCache.name: Banger
plexMoviesCache.description: When an intelligence agent offers a washed-up DJ the opportunity to take down his young rival, he sees it as a chance to return to the top with a banger.

plexMoviesCache.name: The Body
plexMoviesCache.description: A crucified body dated back to the first century A.D is uncovered at an ancient cave in Jerusalem. Trouble ensues as word spreads.

plexMoviesCache.name: Bogieville
plexMoviesCache.description: A young couple on the run come across a derelict trailer park called Bogieville. Convinced to stay by the sinister caretaker, they soon learn that he is a guardian to the Bogievillians, a pack of vampires.

plexMoviesCache.name: The Bricklayer
plexMoviesCache.description: Someone is blackmailing the CIA by assassinating foreign journalists and making it look like the agency is responsible. As the world begins to unite against the U.S., the CIA must lure its most brilliant – and rebellious – operative out of retirement, forcing him to confront his checkered past while unraveling an international conspiracy.

plexMoviesCache.name: Cheer to Life
plexMoviesCache.description: Jéssica (Thati Lopes) is a simple young woman, dedicated to her job at an antique shop in Rio de Janeiro, but she feels her life lacks purpose. Everything changes when she finds a mysterious locket identical to an item she inherited from her late mother. Driven by the desire to understand the connection between the locket and her family history, Jéssica teams up with Gabriel (Rodrigo Simas), a distant relative who appears unexpectedly.

plexMoviesCache.name: Clown in a Cornfield
plexMoviesCache.description: Quinn and her father have just moved to the quiet town of Kettle Springs hoping for a fresh start. Instead, she discovers a fractured community that has fallen on hard times after the treasured Baypen Corn Syrup Factory burned down. As the locals bicker amongst themselves and tensions boil over, a sinister, grinning figure emerges from the cornfields to cleanse the town of its burdens, one bloody victim at a time.

plexMoviesCache.name: The Con Artists
plexMoviesCache.description: Belle Duke, in order to get revenge on her former lover Philip Bang, organizes his jail break. But instead of Philip is the Italian Felice Brianza, AKAS Felix, to escape. Now Felix is obliged to help Philip escape. He succeeds and from that moment on the two will join to defraud Belle. The swindle plot becomes more complicated when Felix falls in love with Philip's daughter.

plexMoviesCache.name: The Creator
plexMoviesCache.description: Amid a future war between the human race and the forces of artificial intelligence, Joshua, a hardened ex-special forces agent grieving the disappearance of his wife, is recruited to hunt down and kill the Creator, the elusive architect of advanced AI who has developed a mysterious weapon with the power to end the war-and mankind itself.

plexMoviesCache.name: Crown of Shadows
plexMoviesCache.description: The Kingdom of Aberon has fallen into darkness under Queen Ginnarra's reign since she murdered the King. Exiled and hunted, her brother Prince Elderon joins a rebellion, summoning a dragon to defeat the Queen and the Dark Gods she serves.

plexMoviesCache.name: The Dad Quest
plexMoviesCache.description: When a father-son duo learns that they may not be biologically related, the two embark on a wild adventure through Mexico to find the truth.

plexMoviesCache.name: Dangerous Animals
plexMoviesCache.description: When Zephyr, a savvy and free-spirited surfer, is abducted by a shark-obsessed serial killer and held captive on his boat, she must figure out how to escape before he carries out a ritualistic feeding to the sharks below.

plexMoviesCache.name: Dead Shot
plexMoviesCache.description: A retired Irish paramilitary witnesses the fatal shooting of his pregnant wife by an SAS officer. After outwitting the SAS, now wounded, and presumed dead, he escapes, taking his revenge to the dark and paranoid streets of 1970's London.

plexMoviesCache.name: Deep Cover
plexMoviesCache.description: DEEP COVER is a fast-paced action comedy starring Bryce Dallas Howard as Kat, an improv comedy teacher beginning to question if she's missed her shot at success. When an undercover cop (Sean Bean) offers her the role of a lifetime, she recruits two of her students (Orlando Bloom and Nick Mohammed) to infiltrate London's gangland by impersonating dangerous criminals.

plexMoviesCache.name: Devils
plexMoviesCache.description: Have you ever felt you are the Devil? The Devil rides among us... on a horse, in Nayarit. This documentary is a personal approach to the Cora festivities that take place during the Holy Week in Jesús María, Nayarit, Mexico. It is said that during these days a supernatural being, Tiyaru, appears.

plexMoviesCache.name: The Dirty South
plexMoviesCache.description: Sue Parker is thrust into a desperate struggle to rescue her family's failing business, teetering on the edge of ruin due to her father's negligence. With the arrival of a charming wanderer, she sees him as their sole hope to help prevent their bar from being seized by the merciless local tycoon.

plexMoviesCache.name: Ecco Valley P
plexMoviesCache.description: No description available

plexMoviesCache.name: Faith of Angels
plexMoviesCache.description: A stranger receives mysterious callings compelling him to search for a boy lost in an abandoned mine.

plexMoviesCache.name: The Front Room
plexMoviesCache.description: Everything goes to hell for newly-pregnant Belinda (Brandy) after her mother-in-law (Kathryn Hunter) moves in. As the diabolical guest tries to get her claws on the child, Belinda must draw the line somewhere…

plexMoviesCache.name: G20
plexMoviesCache.description: Terrorists take over the G20 summit with President Sutton, bringing her governing and military experience to defend her family, company, and the world.

plexMoviesCache.name: Goodrich
plexMoviesCache.description: Andy Goodrich's life is upended when his wife enters a rehab program, leaving him on his own with their young kids. Goodrich leans on Grace, his daughter from his first marriage, as he ultimately evolves into the father she never had.

plexMoviesCache.name: The Hill of Secrets
plexMoviesCache.description: Myung-eun can't comprehend the word "family". She wishes to keep it a secret because she is so different from what she would like to be. When it comes to writing, on the other hand, she does not allow herself to be restricted by reality.

plexMoviesCache.name: Hit and Run
plexMoviesCache.description: HIT AND RUN is a comedy about a young couple ('Kristen Bell' and 'Dax Shepard') who risk it all when they leave their small-town life and embark on a road trip that may lead them towards the opportunity of a lifetime. Their fast-paced road trip grows awkwardly complicated and hilarious when they are chased by a friend from the past (Bradley Cooper), a federal marshal (Tom Arnold) and a band of misfits.

plexMoviesCache.name: The Ides of March
plexMoviesCache.description: A campaign press secretary becomes involved in a scandal that threatens his candidate's election chances.

plexMoviesCache.name: Irish Ashes
plexMoviesCache.description: When the son of an infamous Irish mobster returns home for the internment of his Mother's ashes, he discovers his sister is missing. Tristan McGowan tracks down the gang responsible for her kidnapping and uncovers a dark family secret.

plexMoviesCache.name: The Jolly Monkey
plexMoviesCache.description: 40 years ago, families disappeared near the isolated Jolly Monkey motel. Today, the family of the owners return to discuss what to do with the place. One by one they are killed by a someone dressed as the motel's mascot and need to escape.

plexMoviesCache.name: The Killer is Calling
plexMoviesCache.description: When a mysterious killer targets her remote island town over the course of one long night, veteran 911 operator Faye must uncover his motives and try to save her community, one emergency call at a time.

plexMoviesCache.name: Little Siberia
plexMoviesCache.description: A pastor's faith turns upside down when a meteorite lands in his small Finnish town, its impact stirring up chaos and criminal intentions.

plexMoviesCache.name: Longlegs
plexMoviesCache.description: FBI Agent Lee Harker is a gifted new recruit assigned to the unsolved case of an elusive serial killer. As the case takes complex turns, unearthing evidence of the occult, Harker discovers a personal connection to the merciless killer and must race against time to stop him before he claims the lives of another innocent family.

plexMoviesCache.name: A Minecraft Movie
plexMoviesCache.description: Four misfits are suddenly pulled through a mysterious portal into a bizarre cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home they'll have to master this world while embarking on a quest with an unexpected expert crafter.

plexMoviesCache.name: The Moguls
plexMoviesCache.description: Sex sells in America and these guys know it. The Amateurs follows a small town band of loveable losers who hit upon an idea that can make their dreams and fantasies come true. Thinking they've found the road to riches and fame they decide to make the world's most innocent adult film. Everyman's fantasy turns into a hilarious misadventure when they find they're in way over their heads.

plexMoviesCache.name: The Monkey
plexMoviesCache.description: When twin brothers Bill and Hal find their father's old monkey toy in the attic, a series of gruesome deaths start. The siblings decide to throw the toy away and move on with their lives, growing apart over the years.

plexMoviesCache.name: Mouse of Horrors
plexMoviesCache.description: In a seaside town, chaos erupts as Doctor Rupert's monstrous creation stalks the night, harvesting body parts for a sinister purpose. No one is safe.

plexMoviesCache.name: Novocaine
plexMoviesCache.description: When the girl of his dreams is kidnapped, a man incapable of feeling physical pain turns his rare condition into an unexpected advantage in the fight to rescue her.

plexMoviesCache.name: Opus
plexMoviesCache.description: A journalist (Ayo Edebiri) is invited to the remote compound of a legendary pop star (John Malkovich) who mysteriously disappeared 30 years ago. Surrounded by the star's cult of sycophants, she gets caught in the middle of his twisted plan.

plexMoviesCache.name: Our Times
plexMoviesCache.description: Take a 20-year journey through the life of main character Truly Lin, seen mostly as a flashback to how her life wound up where it is now. Back in her senior year of high school she teamed up with TaiYu to break up the growing relationship between rivals Ouyang and Minmin. Through the course of the next year all four teens mature, and in the end, nothing is as originally desired although Truly and TaiYu wind up with the ones they initially wanted.

plexMoviesCache.name: Peter Pan's Neverland Nightmare
plexMoviesCache.description: Wendy Darling strikes out in an attempt to rescue her brother Michael from 'the clutches of the evil Peter Pan.' Along the way she meets Tinkerbell, who will be seen taking heroin, believing that it's pixie dust.

plexMoviesCache.name: Poison Tree
plexMoviesCache.description: Adam and Nichole Benson move to a quiet suburban neighborhood to escape from the tension of their pasts. A troubling discovery soon disrupts their everyday life with a chilling message that not everything stays buried forever.

plexMoviesCache.name: Popeye the Slayer Man
plexMoviesCache.description: A curious group of friends sneak into an abandoned spinach canning factory to investigate the legend of the "Sailor Man," who is said to haunt the factory and local docks.

plexMoviesCache.name: Rich Flu
plexMoviesCache.description: Explores how far people would go to save themselves when the wealth that made the world go round then becomes its most dangerous commodity after a strange disease threatens to kill anyone with any sort of fortune.

plexMoviesCache.name: Rule Breakers
plexMoviesCache.description: In a nation where educating girls is seen as rebellion, a visionary woman dares to teach young minds to dream. When their innovation draws global attention, their success sparks hope—and opposition. As threats loom and sacrifices are made, their courage and unity ignite a movement that could forever transform the world.

plexMoviesCache.name: The Rule of Jenny Pen
plexMoviesCache.description: Confined to a secluded rest home and trapped within his stroke-ridden body, a former Judge must stop an elderly psychopath who employs a child's puppet to abuse the home's residents with deadly consequences.

plexMoviesCache.name: Saint Catherine
plexMoviesCache.description: An orphaned girl is rescued from a satanic ritual and taken to Saint Catherine Institute for homeless youth. There she will learn new skills while facing demons that stalk her.

plexMoviesCache.name: Semi-Soeter
plexMoviesCache.description: Semi-Soeter is the much anticipated sequel to the beloved 2012 Afrikaans film Semi-Soet.

plexMoviesCache.name: Shiver Me Timbers
plexMoviesCache.description: In 1986 Northern California, Olive Oyl, her brother Castor and friends, go on a camping trip to see the meteor shower with Halley's comet. But the night turns into horror as a meteor transforms Popeye, into a unstoppable killing machine.

plexMoviesCache.name: The Substance
plexMoviesCache.description: Have you ever dreamed of a better version of yourself? You. Only better in every way. Seriously. You've got to try this new product. It's called the Substance. It changed my life. It generates another you. A new, younger, more beautiful, more perfect you. And there's only one rule: you share time. One week for you. One week for the new you. Seven days each. A perfect balance. Easy, right? If you respect the balance...what could possibly go wrong?

plexMoviesCache.name: Survival of the Surviving Survivor
plexMoviesCache.description: No description available

plexMoviesCache.name: Take Cover
plexMoviesCache.description: A burned-out professional sniper finds himself trapped in an all-glass penthouse by a lethal competitor and must find a way to survive and escape with little to no cover between him and the killer.

plexMoviesCache.name: The Teacher Who Promised the Sea
plexMoviesCache.description: The buried memories of the Spanish Civil War are unearthed as a woman searches for the remains of her grandfather's father and discovers the story of an idealistic young teacher from Tarragona.

plexMoviesCache.name: This Time Next Year
plexMoviesCache.description: Minnie and Quinn are born on the same day, one minute apart. Their lives may begin together, but their worlds couldn't be more different. Years later they find themselves together again. Maybe it's time to take a chance on love.

plexMoviesCache.name: Titan: The OceanGate Disaster
plexMoviesCache.description: Titan: The OceanGate Disaster examines CEO Stockton Rush's quest to become the next billionaire innovator and the doomed underwater endeavor that called into question the price of ambition in the depths of the ocean.

plexMoviesCache.name: What the Waters Left Behind: Scars
plexMoviesCache.description: An Anglo-American indie rock band ends up stranded in the desolate city of Epecuén. Their conflicts between themselves and their bad luck are quickly forgotten when they begin to discover the bloody hell that awaits them.

plexMoviesCache.name: The Woman in the Yard
plexMoviesCache.description: A mysterious woman repeatedly appears in a family's front yard, often delivering chilling warnings and unsettling messages, leaving them to question her identity, motives and the potential danger she might pose.

plexMoviesCache.name: A Working Man
plexMoviesCache.description: Levon Cade left his profession behind to work construction and be a good dad to his daughter. But when a local girl vanishes, he's asked to return to the skills that made him a mythic figure in the shadowy world of counter-terrorism.

In a post-apocalyptic future where humans have started breeding genetically modified people, and names have been transformed to numbers, the totalitarian government has banished the right to free will forcing these people to live and work in labour camps. 1080 decides to escape as he begins to question his own identity...

The silence after the death and the death after the silence. Carlos wants to get rid of his past as of the house that some day was a home. And if it's possible that a buyer appears for the house, but the memories are not for selling.

plexArabicCache.description: In the middle of the 10 day war for Slovenian independence (1991), two soldiers day-dream about the future of their newborn country.

plexArabicCache.name: A.M.
plexArabicCache.description: A young woman encounters a bizarre presence on a desolate desert highway.

plexArabicCache.name: Al1 JINO AR 3 IBRAHIM BORJ ELHOB 2
Beethoven: Symphonies Nos. 1-9 / The Beethoven Project
plexArabicCache.description: This is a 4-DVD set, featuring the Estonian conductor Paavo Järvi and the chamber orchestra (around 40 members) Die Deutsche Kammerphilharmonie Bremen. The first 3 DVDs feature live performances of all 9 of Beethoven's symphonies, and the 4th DVD is a documentary produced for DW (Deutsche Welle) on this Beethoven project.

plexArabicCache.name: Black Mesa: The 16 Year Project to Remake Half-Life
plexArabicCache.description: NoClip talk to Crowbar Collective about their 16 year journey rebuilding the original Half-Life.

plexArabicCache.name: Nothing To Lose
plexArabicCache.description: Somchai (Pierre Png), a debt-ridden gambling addict, goes to the top of a building to commit suicide and finds a young woman, Go-go (Arisara Wongchalee), standing on the ledge ready to do the same. Rather than going through with the plans for death, the two talk and decide that there's nothing they can't do, since they had decided to die. So they embark on a crime spree, starting out by eating in a restaurant and not paying the bill, then stealing a car and crashing it for fun. They rob a convenience store, and are pursued by the police, and the gangsters Somchai pursue the couple as well.

plexArabicCache.name: Nuclear Savage: The Islands of Secret Project 4.1
plexArabicCache.description: A shocking political expose, and an intimate ethnographic portrait of Pacific Islanders struggling for survival, dignity and justice after decades of top-secret human radiation experiments conducted on them by the U.S. government.

plexArabicCache.name: Project 17
plexArabicCache.description: Grace tries to save a deformed child's humanity when a scientist poses this child as an alien to save his budget slashed exploration program.

plexArabicCache.name: Two - One - Zero
plexArabicCache.description: An anthology of two highly experimental apocalyptic fantasy dramas with sci-fi and psychological horror elements. Originally intended to comprise a third story, 'Sifr' ['Zero'], directed by Nagi Angelo; the film was banned outright by the Egyptian censor and may not have made its domestic premiere until broadcast on satellite television in November 2012.

plexArabicCache.name: Ultra Q: The 1/8 Project
plexArabicCache.description: Theatrical version of episode 17 of Ultra Q TV series.
